reviews.comment:
Muy atento el muchacho del shop. Sabe todo lo referente al pueblo. La Paz, un hermoso lugar, tranquilo. La gente es muy cordial.

(Translated by Google)
The young man at the shop was very helpful. He knows everything about the town. La Paz is a beautiful, peaceful place. The people are very friendly.

reviews.comment:
Muy bien todo,falta que habrá a la noche el local comercial, necesitas algo y está cerrado,lo demás muy bien,el personal muy respetuoso

(Translated by Google)
Everything was great, except the shop needs to be closed at night; if you need something, it's closed. Otherwise, it's very good, and the staff are very respectful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9753367623669844910/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtZ09DWWFREAE

reviews.comment:
El sr q nos atendió muy maleducado.... Le faltó el respeto a mí hija ... ... La app de YPF no funcionaba, cosa q no nos dijo antes de cargar .... Pedimos para limpiar el parabrisas ..... No tenían  uno sano. El que había estaba roto y dejaba todo rallado el parabrisas... .... Un desastre.... Si pueden pasar y no cargar nafta ahí es lo mejor q pueden hacer...

(Translated by Google)
The man who served us was very rude. He disrespected my daughter. The YPF app wasn't working, which they didn't tell us before we filled up. We asked to have the windshield cleaned, but they didn't have a clean one. The one they had was cracked and scratched the windshield. It was a disaster. If you can drive by and not fill up there, that's the best thing you can do.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9753367623669844910/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtNTRhTmpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nesecitaba comprar algunas cosas y abrieron casi a las 10 de la mañana muy tarde

(Translated by Google)
I needed to buy some things and they opened almost at 10 in the morning, very late.
